'''Tergeth Dilorr''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was a part of the [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] terrorist [[Ort Hoogra-D'En]]'s network.

==Biography==
Dilorr had formerly served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] as a conscript who drifted from [[Planet/Legends|planet]] to planet after leaving the service. He eventually signed on with Hoogra-D'En's group for the money they were offering, though he later developed the same anti-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] point of view as the organization's leader. However, he disagreed with the group's preference of working alone and thought that Hoogra-D'En would accomplish more if he joined forces with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

==Appearances==
